refined_caption: The hospital food tray contains a variety of foods that appear unappetizing. The presentation of the food is unappealing.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my hospital stay. The food on the tray looked unappetizing and I did not feel like eating it. This is not the standard of food I expect from a hospital.
voice_text: The food they're serving here looks really gross, I don't want to eat it.
